cb: bun create better-fullstack@latest <name> --ecosystem go --go-web-framework <gin|echo|none> --go-orm <gorm|sqlc|none> --go-api <grpc-go|none> --go-cli <cobra|bubbletea|none> --go-logging <zap|none> --addons none --examples none --ai-docs none --no-install --no-git --disable-analytics

notes: Per combo verification: bts.jsonc marker checks + go.mod presence + go mod tidy && go build ./...
BugZ_go_none_web_unused_addr: go-base cmd/server main template declared addr even when goWebFramework=none, producing compile error 'declared and not used: addr'
Fix: conditionally emit host/port/addr variables in go server template based on goWebFramework and goApi
Local CLI re-test after fix: both failing combos passed
